screens.label: Login Page
screens.a11y_notes: Primary CTA keyboard-focusable. Dev bypass link visible when VITE_DEV_AUTH=true.
screens.notes: Entra ID OIDC entry point. Dev bypass mode simulates signed-in user.

screens.label: Connect Subscription
screens.a11y_notes: Mode A/B/C radio group with fieldset+legend. Error message role=alert.
screens.notes: Stores subscriptionId in sessionStorage after POST /v1/auth/connect.

screens.label: Collection Status
screens.a11y_notes: aria-live region for step status updates. ProgressBar with aria-valuenow.
screens.notes: Polls GET /v1/collect/status?subscriptionId= with exponential backoff. Links to /app/findings/:subscriptionId when complete.

screens.label: Findings Report (Tier 1)
screens.a11y_notes: Table th scope=col. MoneyRangeBar aria-label includes currency. EffortBadge uses role=img aria-label.
screens.notes: Tier 1 free report. Blurred rows with upgrade CTA for Tier 2+ fields. Links to /app/upgrade/:subscriptionId.

screens.label: Upgrade Page
screens.a11y_notes: Tier comparison cards use role=list. Checkout button aria-busy during redirect.
screens.notes: Shows Tier 2 vs Tier 3 cards. POST /v1/billing/checkout returns redirectUrl. Links to billing portal if already subscribed.

screens.label: Admin Dashboard
screens.a11y_notes: KPI cards use <dl>/<dt>/<dd>. MRR value aria-label includes currency.
screens.notes: Shows MRR (CAD), active subscriptions, scans/day, analyses/day, deliveries/day, failure rate %.

screens.label: Admin Customers
screens.a11y_notes: Search input aria-label. Results table th scope=col.
screens.notes: Search by subscriptionId, stripeCustomerId. Shows tier, paymentStatus, isLocked, lastActivityUtc. Deep link to runs.

screens.label: Admin Billing
screens.a11y_notes: Reconcile button shows aria-busy during job. Confirmation modal traps focus.
screens.notes: Shows Stripe webhook health. Reconcile Stripe button (ACA_Admin only) with confirmation modal.

screens.label: Admin Runs
screens.a11y_notes: Filter select aria-label. Run status badges role=status.
screens.notes: Lists scan/analysis/delivery runs. Filter by subscriptionId and type. Shows status, duration, correlationId.

screens.label: Admin Controls
screens.a11y_notes: All forms have label+input associations. Confirmation modals use role=dialog, aria-modal=true, focus trap.
screens.notes: Grant tier form (subscriptionId, tier, days, reason). Lock/unlock subscription form. All actions write admin_audit_events. Confirmation modal for destructive actions.
